independenceDay.name: NASCO TOASTER 850W
independenceDay.description: The NASCO TOASTER 850W is a compact and efficient appliance designed for quick and easy toasting.
independenceDay.fullDescription:
The NASCO TOASTER 850W is a compact and efficient appliance designed for quick and easy toasting. Here are its key features and specifications:
    Type: 2-Slice Toaster Power: 850 watts for fast and even toasting. Functions: Includes reheat, cancel, and defrost options for versatility. Design: Compact with a sleek white finish, featuring stainless steel accents. Ease of Use: Equipped with a ready light and fixed temperature control for convenience.
    Slot Size: Short slots measuring approximately 130 x 32 mm. Voltage: 220-240V, 50/60Hz. Body Material: Plastic with stainless steel accents. Cleaning: Non-stick, easy-to-clean flat grids.
This toaster is a practical choice for everyday use, offering reliable performance and a stylish design.

independenceDay.name: APC Back-UPS 500VA
independenceDay.description: The APC Back‑UPS 500VA functions as an uninterruptible power supply system, which provides dependable power protection for your computer and network equipment, and home electronic devices against power outages, voltage fluctuations, and power surges. The system maintains power to essential equipment through its battery backup system and automatic voltage regulation, which allows users to complete their work and power down their devices safely.
independenceDay.fullDescription:
• Capacity: 500 VA / 300 W

• Output: 230 V (typical for Ghana/EU markets)

• Battery Type: Sealed Lead‑Acid (maintenance‑free)

• Outlets: Multiple battery‑backup and surge‑protected sockets

• Surge Protection: Yes

• Runtime: Provides several minutes of backup at low load (varies with device)

• Features: Automatic Voltage Regulation (AVR), Power‑on self‑test, LED indicators for status, Audible alarms for power events

independenceDay.name: Resonate UPS CRU 12V2 A Gen 2
independenceDay.description: This Resonate UPS CRU 12V2 A Gen 2 ensures uninterrupted internet connectivity during power outages, making it ideal for work-from-home setups, online classes, and entertainment.
independenceDay.fullDescription:
This Resonate UPS CRU 12V2 A Gen 2 ensures uninterrupted internet connectivity during power outages, making it ideal for work-from-home setups, online classes, and entertainment. It features zero-drop connectivity, meaning your devices won't experience any interruptions when switching to backup power. The Gen 2 model comes with 30% extra power backup compared to its predecessor, thanks to its upgraded 3x2600mAh lithium-ion batteries. It is compatible with a wide range of devices, including routers, modems, set-top boxes, IoT devices, and mini cameras. The Resonate UPS CRU 12V2 A Gen 2 is designed for plug-and-play installation, requiring no technical expertise. It also includes intelligent safety features, such as overcharge protection, short-circuit prevention, and advanced battery management for longer battery life. Specifications
    Battery Capacity: 3x2600mAh lithium-ion batteries Backup Time: Up to 4 hours Compatibility: 12V devices with up to 2A power requirements Safety Features: Overcharge protection, short-circuit prevention, intelligent battery management Installation: Plug-and-play, DIY setup Certifications: CE, RoHS, BIS certified

independenceDay.name: Asano 5L 1800W Air Fryer
independenceDay.description: The Asano 5L 1800W Air Fryer is a powerful kitchen appliance that enables oil-free frying, grilling, roasting, and baking using Rapid Air technology.
independenceDay.fullDescription:
The Asano 5L 1800W Air Fryer is a powerful kitchen appliance that enables oil-free frying, grilling, roasting, and baking using Rapid Air technology. It offers a 5.0-liter capacity and operates at 1800W, providing efficient cooking with adjustable temperature up to 200�C and a 60-minute timer. Designed for safety and convenience, it features auto-off functionality, overheat protection, and a heat-insulated handle for secure handling. The detachable basket ensures easy cleaning, while its knob control system allows precise adjustments. Built with a sleek black plastic body, it is compact and lightweight at 3.8kg, making it an excellent addition to any kitchen. Running on 220-240V, 50/60Hz, the Asano 5L 1800W Air Fryer guarantees fast and effective cooking results with significantly reduced oil content for healthier meals
    Capacity: 5.0L Power: 1800W Body Material: Plastic (Black) Control Type: Knob Control Time Control: 10-60 minutes Temperature Range: Up to 200�C Power Supply: 220-240V, 50/60Hz Gross Weight: 3.8kg Dimensions: 327�326�380 mm Detachable Basket for easy cleaning Overheat Protection for safety

independenceDay.name: OPPO A5 PRO (8GB+256GB)
independenceDay.description: A rugged-feeling mid-range smartphone that pairs a large smooth 6.67″ display with strong battery life and a versatile 50 MP camera setup built to handle daily tasks, long multimedia sessions, and casual photography with ease.
independenceDay.fullDescription:
• Display: 6.67″ HD+ IPS LCD with 120 Hz refresh rate and up to 1000 nits brightness

• Processor: Qualcomm Snapdragon 6s Gen 1 (11 nm) Octa-core

• Memory: 8 GB RAM

• Storage: 256 GB internal, expandable via microSD

• Rear Camera: Dual 50 MP (main) + 2 MP (depth) with LED flash, HDR, and panorama

• Front Camera: 8 MP

• Battery: 5800 mAh with 45 W SuperVOOC/PD fast charging

• OS: Android 15 with ColorOS 15 (or Android 14 with ColorOS 14 in some regions)

• Connectivity: Dual SIM, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, USB-C, NFC.

• Build & Durability: IP68/IP69 dust and water resistance with military-grade shock protection

• Sensors: Side-mounted fingerprint, accelerometer, proximity, compass.

• Best for: Daily browsing, social media, video streaming, and long battery usage with solid photo capabilities.

independenceDay.fullDescription:

• Memory: 4 GB RAM

independenceDay.name: BINATONE MICROWAVE 20L BLACK MWO-2018
independenceDay.description: The BINATONE MICROWAVE 20L BLACK MWO-2018�is your everyday kitchen companion for fast and efficient cooking.
independenceDay.fullDescription:
The BINATONE MICROWAVE 20L BLACK MWO-2018�is your everyday kitchen companion for fast and efficient cooking. With a spacious 20-liter capacity, 5 adjustable power levels, and a rotating glass plate for even heating, it�s perfect for reheating meals, defrosting frozen food, and warming beverages. Designed with a sleek black finish, tamper-proof glass door, and easy-to-clean grey cavity, this microwave combines style, safety, and convenience. Whether for home or office use, the MWO-2018 delivers reliable performance with a cooking end signal and defrost selection for added ease.
    Capacity: 20 Liters Rated Input Power: 1050W Rated Output Power: 700W Microwave Frequency: 2450 MHz Voltage: 230V ~ 50Hz Power Levels: 5 adjustable microwave settings Interior: Easy-to-clean grey cavity Plate: Rotating glass plate for even heat distribution Defrost Function: Time or weight-based selection Cooking End Signal: Alerts when heating is complete Design:
      Tamper-proof glass door Metal housing Compact and stylish black finish
    Weight: Approx. 5.5 kg Dimensions: Standard countertop size

independenceDay.name: iPhone 17 Pro 256GB + Accessories
independenceDay.description: A top‑tier flagship smartphone with a stunning 6.3″ ProMotion OLED display, ultra‑fast performance thanks to the A19 Pro chip, and a versatile triple‑camera system built for users who want premium speed, pro‑grade photography, smooth visuals, and long‑term software support.
independenceDay.fullDescription:
• Display: 6.3″ Super Retina XDR OLED with 120 Hz ProMotion, HDR10, Dolby Vision, and up to 3000 nits peak brightness

• Processor: Apple A19 Pro chip with 6‑core CPU, 6‑core GPU, and 16‑core Neural Engine

• Memory: 12 GB RAM (varies by configuration).

• Storage: 256 GB internal

• Rear Camera: Triple 48 MP setup (main, ultra‑wide, periscope telephoto with up to 4× optical zoom + LiDAR)

• Front Camera: 18 MP

• Battery: Type Li-Ion 3998 mAh – Nano SIM model. Li-Ion 4252 mAh – eSIM only model

• OS: iOS 26 with Apple Intelligence and long‑term update support.

• Build/Other: IP68 water/dust resistance, Ceramic Shield 2 front and back, premium aluminum unibody, USB‑C with high‑speed data, 5G connectivity, Wi‑Fi 7, Bluetooth.

• Best for: Users seeking flagship performance, professional‑level photography/video, smooth high‑refresh display, and long‑term software support.

IPMC AIO i5 Desktop: Sleek all‑in‑one design powered by Intel Core i5, perfect for multitasking, office work, and home use.

This bundle is tailored for professionals, students, and families who want reliable computing with a stylish audio upgrade. With IPMCKART, you’re not just buying a desktop—you’re unlocking a complete lifestyle package.

independenceDay.name: Binatone Blender with Grinder – BLG 460
independenceDay.description:
Simplify your kitchen tasks with the Binatone BLG 460 Blender & Grinder, designed for efficiency, durability, and everyday convenience. This versatile appliance is perfect for preparing smoothies, soups, sauces, and grinding dry ingredients with ease.

Powerful Motor: Delivers consistent blending and grinding performance for both soft and tough ingredients.

Durable Grinder Attachment: Ideal for coffee beans, spices, and nuts, giving you freshly ground results at home.

Sturdy Build: Designed with safety and durability in mind, ensuring long‑lasting use.

Easy to Clean: Detachable parts make maintenance simple and hassle‑free.

Perfect for families, students, and professionals who want a reliable kitchen companion, the Binatone BLG 460 combines functionality with value, making it a must‑have addition to your home.
